name: io.github.nirholas/ibm-watsonx
description: IBM watsonx.ai MCP server — chat, text generation, embeddings, tokenization, and model discovery with IBM Granite foundation models, using your own IBM Cloud credentials.

environmentVariables.name: WATSONX_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: IBM Cloud API key (create one at https://cloud.ibm.com/iam/apikeys).

environmentVariables.name: WATSONX_PROJECT_ID
environmentVariables.description: watsonx.ai project id (Project → Manage → General → Project ID). Provide this or WATSONX_SPACE_ID.

environmentVariables.name: WATSONX_SPACE_ID
environmentVariables.description: watsonx.ai deployment space id. Alternative to WATSONX_PROJECT_ID.

environmentVariables.name: WATSONX_URL
environmentVariables.description: Regional inference host. Defaults to https://us-south.ml.cloud.ibm.com.

environmentVariables.name: WATSONX_MODEL_ID
environmentVariables.description: Default chat/generation model id. Defaults to ibm/granite-3-8b-instruct.

environmentVariables.name: WATSONX_EMBED_MODEL_ID
environmentVariables.description: Default embedding model id. Defaults to ibm/granite-embedding-278m-multilingual.

environmentVariables.name: WATSONX_API_VERSION
environmentVariables.description: watsonx.ai REST API version date. Defaults to 2024-05-31.
